issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING SLOWLY IN THE PARKING GARAGE THAT I HAVE USED FOR 24 YEARS.  I TURNED THE WHEEL GENTLY TO MAKE WHAT I ESTIMATE TO BE A 60 DEGREE TURN.  THE NEXT THING I KNEW, THE CAR HAD SMASHED INTO A LOAD-BEARING PILLAR.  THE CAR WAS DRIVEABLE BUT LATER WAS LABELED TOTALED.  THE

UPON PURCHASING MY MOTORCYCLE, THE FIRST TIME AFTER GETTING IT HOME IT REFUSED TO START.  IN TROUBLESHOOTING THE ISSUE, I FOUND THE KILL SWITCH WAS NOT WORKING PROPERLY.  I WIGGLED THE SWITCH AND IT EVENTUALLY STARTED.  THIS HAPPENED SEVERAL TIMES SINCE THAT DAY, AND I WAS THINKI

narrative.headline: What 2008 Honda Cbr600rr owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
